description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this lovely piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSlim silver band that curves tangentially at the centre, encrusted with white stonesThree bigger white stones holding the two sides of the ring togetherMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
